// exclude: Reset the root tsconfig's exclude list. The root excludes `plugins/` wholesale, which excludes this plugin's own src/ and causes tsc to vacuously pass with TS18003. Resetting to [] lets `bunx tsc --noEmit` actually check our files. rootDir/outDir/emit-related fields are dropped because this tsconfig is a type-check sanity config, not a build config — @elizaos/core resolves via root `paths` to eliza/packages/typescript/src, which lives outside this plugin's src/ and would otherwise trip TS6059.
